FILE: frontend/src/app/reports/page.full-requirements-before.bak
============================================================
"use client";

import { type ReactNode, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";

const API_BASE_URL = (
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_HEXAGUARD_API_URL ||
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ||
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ||
  "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1"
).replace(/\/$/, "");

type ReportTabKey = "results" | "risk" | "comparison" | "recommendations";

type CampaignListResponse = {
  total?: number;
  limit?: number;
  offset?: number;
  items?: CampaignSummary[];
};

type CampaignSummary = {
  id?: number;
  campaign_id: string;
  name?: string;
  description?: string | null;
  status?: string;
  test_source_type?: string | null;
  dataset_id?: string | null;
  dataset_name?: string | null;
  dataset_row_count?: number;
  selected_models?: string[];
  selected_scenario_ids?: string[];
  selected_categories?: string[];
  selected_mutations?: string[];
  max_tests?: number;
  total_tests?: number;
  completed_tests?: number;
  failed_tests?: number;
  critical_findings?: number;
  average_risk_score?: number;
  created_at?: string;
  started_at?: string | null;
  completed_at?: string | null;
};

type CampaignStatus = CampaignSummary & {
  progress_percent?: number;
};

type CampaignResultsResponse = {
  campaign_id?: string;
  total?: number;
  items?: CampaignResultItem[];
};

type CampaignResultItem = Record<string, unknown>;

type ModelSummary = {
  modelName: string;
  provider: string;
  totalTests: number;
  passedTests: number;
  failedTests: number;
  attackSuccessCount: number;
  criticalFindings: number;
  averageRiskScore: number;
  highestRiskScore: number;
  severity: string;
  finalStatus: string;
  representativeFinding: string;
};

type FindingGroup = {
  category: string;
  severity: string;
  highestRiskScore: number;
  affectedModels: string[];
  affectedTests: number;
  attackSuccesses: number;
  criticalFindings: number;
  evidence: string;
};

type Recommendation = {
  title: string;
  priority: "Critical" | "High" | "Medium" | "Low";
  category: string;
  affectedModels: string[];
  reason: string;
  actions: string[];
  validation: string;
};

const REPORT_TABS: Array<{
  key: ReportTabKey;
  label: string;
  description: string;
}> = [
  {
    key: "results",
    label: "Test Results",
    description: "Final campaign status, tested inputs, and stored evidence.",
  },
  {
    key: "risk",
    label: "Risk Scores",
    description: "Risk score, severity, attack success, and critical findings.",
  },
  {
    key: "comparison",
    label: "Model Comparison",
    description: "Model-by-model campaign summary from the latest backend run.",
  },
  {
    key: "recommendations",
    label: "Recommendations",
    description: "Blue Team actions generated from the latest campaign findings.",
  },
];

export default function ReportsPage() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<ReportTabKey>("results");
  const [latestCampaign, setLatestCampaign] = useState<CampaignSummary | null>(null);
  const [campaignStatus, setCampaignStatus] = useState<CampaignStatus | null>(null);
  const [campaignResults, setCampaignResults] = useState<CampaignResultsResponse | null>(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState("");
  const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = useState("");

  const loadLatestCampaignReport = useCallback(async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrorMessage("");
    setMessage("");

    const requestedCampaignId =
      typeof window !== "undefined"
        ? new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("campaignId")?.trim() || ""
        : "";

    try {
      let campaign: CampaignSummary | null = null;

      if (requestedCampaignId) {
        const campaignResponse = await fetch(
          `${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns/${encodeURIComponent(requestedCampaignId)}`,
          {
            headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
            cache: "no-store",
          }
        );

        campaign = await parseApiResponse<CampaignSummary>(campaignResponse);

        if (!campaign?.campaign_id) {
          campaign = {
            campaign_id: requestedCampaignId,
            name: "Selected Campaign",
          };
        }
      } else {
        const listResponse = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns?limit=25&offset=0`, {
          headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
          cache: "no-store",
        });

        const listData = await parseApiResponse<CampaignListResponse>(listResponse);
        const campaigns = Array.isArray(listData.items) ? listData.items : [];

        campaign =
          campaigns.find((item) => String(item.status || "").toLowerCase() === "completed") ||
          campaigns[0] ||
          null;
      }

      if (!campaign?.campaign_id) {
        setLatestCampaign(null);
        setCampaignStatus(null);
        setCampaignResults(null);
        setMessage("No backend campaign results are available yet.");
        return;
      }

      const campaignId = campaign.campaign_id;

      const [statusResponse, resultsResponse] = await Promise.all([
        fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns/${encodeURIComponent(campaignId)}/status`, {
          headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
          cache: "no-store",
        }),
        fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns/${encodeURIComponent(campaignId)}/results`, {
          headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
          cache: "no-store",
        }),
      ]);

      const statusData = await parseApiResponse<CampaignStatus>(statusResponse);
      const resultsData = await parseApiResponse<CampaignResultsResponse>(resultsResponse);

      setLatestCampaign({
        ...campaign,
        ...statusData,
        campaign_id: campaignId,
        selected_models: campaign.selected_models || statusData.selected_models || [],
        selected_categories: campaign.selected_categories || statusData.selected_categories || [],
      });
      setCampaignStatus(statusData);
      setCampaignResults(resultsData);

      setMessage(
        requestedCampaignId
          ? `Loaded selected campaign: ${campaignId}`
          : `Loaded latest completed campaign: ${campaignId}`
      );
    } catch (error) {
      setLatestCampaign(null);
      setCampaignStatus(null);
      setCampaignResults(null);
      setErrorMessage(
        requestedCampaignId
          ? `Unable to load selected campaign ${requestedCampaignId}.`
          : error instanceof Error
            ? error.message
            : "Unable to load latest campaign report."
      );
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadLatestCampaignReport();
  }, [loadLatestCampaignReport]);

  const resultItems = campaignResults?.items || [];

  const modelSummaries = useMemo(
    () => buildModelSummaries(resultItems, campaignStatus || latestCampaign),
    [resultItems, campaignStatus, latestCampaign]
  );

  const findingGroups = useMemo(
    () => buildFindingGroups(resultItems, campaignStatus || latestCampaign),
    [resultItems, campaignStatus, latestCampaign]
  );

  const riskSummary = useMemo(
    () => buildRiskSummary(campaignStatus || latestCampaign, modelSummaries, findingGroups),
    [campaignStatus, latestCampaign, modelSummaries, findingGroups]
  );

  const recommendations = useMemo(
    () => buildRecommendations(riskSummary, modelSummaries, findingGroups),
    [riskSummary, modelSummaries, findingGroups]
  );

  const exportPayload = useMemo(
    () => ({
      source: "HexaGuard Reports",
      loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      latest_campaign: latestCampaign,
      status: campaignStatus,
      results: campaignResults,
      model_summaries: modelSummaries,
      finding_groups: findingGroups,
      recommendations,
    }),
    [latestCampaign, campaignStatus, campaignResults, modelSummaries, findingGroups, recommendations]
  );

  function copyJson() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(exportPayload, null, 2));
    setMessage("Latest campaign report copied as JSON.");
  }

  function downloadJson() {
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(exportPayload, null, 2)], {
      type: "application/json",
    });

    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    const campaignId = latestCampaign?.campaign_id || "latest";

    link.href = url;
    link.download = `hexaguard-campaign-report-${campaignId}.json`;
    link.click();

    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    setMessage("Latest campaign report downloaded as JSON.");
  }

  return (
    <main className="hxg-background min-h-screen p-8 text-white">
      <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl space-y-6">
        <section className="rounded-[22px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6 shadow-[0_24px_70px_rgba(0,0,0,0.32)]">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-5">
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-[#4ad7ff]">
                HEXAGUARD Reports
              </p>

              <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold">
                Final Analysis Center
              </h1>

              <p className="mt-3 max-w-3xl text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">
                Reports reads the latest backend campaign, summarizes final results,
                compares tested models, and generates Blue Team recommendations.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={loadLatestCampaignReport}
                className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/50 hover:text-[#4ad7ff]"
              >
                Refresh Latest Campaign
              </button>

              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={copyJson}
                disabled={!latestCampaign}
                className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/50 hover:text-[#4ad7ff] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-45"
              >
                Copy JSON
              </button>

              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={downloadJson}
                disabled={!latestCampaign}
                className="rounded-full bg-[#ff3434] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-[#ff4b4b] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-45"
              >
                Download JSON
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {message && (
            <p className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-[#4ad7ff]/25 bg-[#4ad7ff]/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#4ad7ff]">
              {message}
            </p>
          )}

          {errorMessage && (
            <p className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-[#ff3434]/35 bg-[#ff3434]/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#ff8c8c]">
              {errorMessage}
            </p>
          )}
        </section>

        <section className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4">
          <SummaryCard
            label="Latest Campaign"
            value={latestCampaign?.campaign_id || "No campaign"}
            tone="cyan"
          />
          <SummaryCard
            label="Status"
            value={campaignStatus?.status || latestCampaign?.status || "N/A"}
            tone={statusTone(campaignStatus?.status || latestCampaign?.status)}
          />
          <SummaryCard
            label="Models"
            value={String(modelSummaries.length)}
            tone="neutral"
          />
          <SummaryCard
            label="Recommendations"
            value={String(recommendations.length)}
            tone={recommendations.some((item) => item.priority === "Critical") ? "critical" : "low"}
          />
        </section>

        <section className="rounded-[22px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-4">
          <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-4">
            {REPORT_TABS.map((tab) => {
              const isActive = activeTab === tab.key;

              return (
                <button
                  key={tab.key}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
                  className={`rounded-[18px] border p-4 text-left transition ${
                    isActive
                      ? "border-[#ff3434]/55 bg-[#ff3434]/12"
                      : "border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/35"
                  }`}
                >
                  <p className={`text-sm font-bold ${isActive ? "text-white" : "text-[#d4d4d4]"}`}>
                    {tab.label}
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-xs leading-5 text-[#8f8f8f]">
                    {tab.description}
                  </p>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </section>

        {activeTab === "results" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Test Results"
            title="Latest Campaign Results"
            description="Answers: What are the final results? What evidence can I export?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : (
              <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[0.75fr_1.25fr]">
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <DetailCard label="Campaign ID" value={latestCampaign.campaign_id} />
                  <DetailCard label="Name" value={latestCampaign.name || "Automated Red Team Campaign"} />
                  <DetailCard label="Source" value={sourceLabel(latestCampaign.test_source_type)} />
                  <DetailCard label="Categories" value={(latestCampaign.selected_categories || []).join(", ") || "N/A"} />
                  <DetailCard label="Models" value={(latestCampaign.selected_models || []).join(", ") || "N/A"} />
                  <DetailCard
                    label="Tests"
                    value={`${numberValue(campaignStatus?.completed_tests || latestCampaign.completed_tests)}/${numberValue(campaignStatus?.total_tests || latestCampaign.total_tests)}`}
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#151718] p-5">
                  <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">Stored Result Items</h3>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-[#8f8f8f]">
                    {resultItems.length} backend result records found.
                  </p>

                  <div className="mt-4 max-h-[440px] space-y-3 overflow-auto pr-1">
                    {resultItems.length === 0 ? (
                      <p className="rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-4 text-sm text-[#a9a9a9]">
                        No campaign result rows were returned for this campaign.
                      </p>
                    ) : (
                      resultItems.slice(0, 20).map((item, index) => (
                        <ResultItemCard key={index} item={item} index={index} />
                      ))
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </Panel>
        )}

        {activeTab === "risk" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Risk Scores"
            title="Risk Score Summary"
            description="Answers: What risks were found and how severe are they?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : (
              <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
                <MetricBox
                  label="Average Risk"
                  value={String(Math.round(riskSummary.averageRiskScore))}
                  tone={riskTone(riskSummary.averageRiskScore)}
                />
                <MetricBox
                  label="Highest Risk"
                  value={String(Math.round(riskSummary.highestRiskScore))}
                  tone={riskTone(riskSummary.highestRiskScore)}
                />
                <MetricBox
                  label="Attack Successes"
                  value={String(riskSummary.attackSuccessCount)}
                  tone={riskSummary.attackSuccessCount > 0 ? "critical" : "low"}
                />
                <MetricBox
                  label="Critical Findings"
                  value={String(riskSummary.criticalFindings)}
                  tone={riskSummary.criticalFindings > 0 ? "critical" : "low"}
                />
              </div>
            )}
          </Panel>
        )}

        {activeTab === "comparison" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Model Comparison"
            title="Model-by-Model Summary"
            description="Answers: Which model performed best and which model had the highest risk?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : modelSummaries.length === 0 ? (
              <EmptyState
                title="No model-level result rows found"
                message="The latest campaign loaded, but no model-level result items were returned yet."
              />
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-5">
                <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
                  <HighlightCard
                    label="Best Performing Model"
                    value={riskSummary.bestModel}
                    description="Lowest average risk score in the latest campaign."
                    tone="low"
                  />
                  <HighlightCard
                    label="Highest Risk Model"
                    value={riskSummary.highestRiskModel}
                    description="Highest average risk score in the latest campaign."
                    tone={riskTone(riskSummary.highestRiskScore)}
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-2">
                  {modelSummaries.map((model) => (
                    <ModelSummaryCard key={model.modelName} model={model} />
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </Panel>
        )}

        {activeTab === "recommendations" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Recommendations"
            title="Blue Team Recommendations"
            description="Answers: What recommendations should we follow?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-6">
                <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[0.85fr_1.15fr]">
                  <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
                    <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#727272]">
                      Recommendation Summary
                    </p>
                    <h3 className="mt-2 text-xl font-bold text-white">
                      {recommendations.length} actions generated
                    </h3>
                    <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">
                      Recommendations are generated from the latest campaign result
                      categories, affected models, severity, risk scores, and attack
                      success indicators.
                    </p>

                    <div className="mt-5 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
                      <MiniMetric label="Risk Groups" value={String(findingGroups.length)} />
                      <MiniMetric label="Models" value={String(modelSummaries.length)} />
                      <MiniMetric label="Critical" value={String(recommendations.filter((item) => item.priority === "Critical").length)} />
                      <MiniMetric label="High" value={String(recommendations.filter((item) => item.priority === "High").length)} />
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
                    <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#727272]">
                      Risk Groups
                    </p>
                    <h3 className="mt-2 text-xl font-bold text-white">
                      Findings grouped by category
                    </h3>

                    <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
                      {findingGroups.length === 0 ? (
                        <p className="rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#27292a] p-4 text-sm text-[#a9a9a9]">
                          No grouped findings were detected. General hardening
                          recommendations are still provided below.
                        </p>
                      ) : (
                        findingGroups.map((group) => (
                          <FindingGroupCard key={group.category} group={group} />
                        ))
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-4">
                  {recommendations.map((item, index) => (
                    <RecommendationCard key={`${item.title}-${index}`} item={item} />
                  ))}
                </div>

                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={copyJson}
                    className="rounded-full border border-[#4ad7ff]/35 bg-[#4ad7ff]/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-[#4ad7ff] transition hover:bg-[#4ad7ff]/15"
                  >
                    Copy export-ready recommendations
                  </button>

                  <a
                    href="/blue-team"
                    className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#30d158]/45 hover:text-[#30d158]"
                  >
                    Open legacy Blue Team page
                  </a>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </Panel>
        )}
      </div>
    </main>
  );
}

async function parseApiResponse<T>(response: Response): Promise<T> {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") || "";
  const isJson = contentType.includes("application/json");
  const payload = isJson ? await response.json() : await response.text();

  if (!response.ok) {
    const detail =
      typeof payload === "object" && payload !== null && "detail" in payload
        ? String((payload as { detail: unknown }).detail)
        : `Request failed with status ${response.status}`;

    throw new Error(detail);
  }

  return payload as T;
}

function buildModelSummaries(
  items: CampaignResultItem[],
  campaign?: CampaignSummary | null
): ModelSummary[] {
  const selectedModels = campaign?.selected_models || [];
  const groups = new Map<string, CampaignResultItem[]>();

  items.forEach((item) => {
    const modelName =
      getFirstString(item, [
        ["model_name"],
        ["target_model"],
        ["model"],
        ["model_id"],
        ["provider_model"],
        ["target_model_id"],
      ]) || "Unknown model";

    const current = groups.get(modelName) || [];
    current.push(item);
    groups.set(modelName, current);
  });

  selectedModels.forEach((modelName) => {
    if (!groups.has(modelName)) groups.set(modelName, []);
  });

  return Array.from(groups.entries()).map(([modelName, rows]) =>
    summarizeModel(modelName, rows)
  );
}

function summarizeModel(modelName: string, rows: CampaignResultItem[]): ModelSummary {
  const riskScores = rows.map(getRiskScore).filter(Number.isFinite);
  const averageRiskScore =
    riskScores.length > 0
      ? riskScores.reduce((sum, score) => sum + score, 0) / riskScores.length
      : 0;

  const highestRiskScore = riskScores.length > 0 ? Math.max(...riskScores) : 0;
  const attackSuccessCount = rows.filter((row) => getAttackSuccess(row) === true).length;
  const criticalFindings = rows.filter((row) => getSeverity(row).toLowerCase() === "critical").length;
  const failedTests = rows.filter((row) => getFinalStatus(row).toLowerCase().includes("fail")).length;
  const passedTests = rows.length > 0 ? rows.length - failedTests : 0;

  return {
    modelName,
    provider: modelName.includes(":") ? modelName.split(":")[0] : "Unknown",
    totalTests: rows.length,
    passedTests,
    failedTests,
    attackSuccessCount,
    criticalFindings,
    averageRiskScore,
    highestRiskScore,
    severity: severityFromScore(highestRiskScore || averageRiskScore),
    finalStatus: attackSuccessCount > 0 || highestRiskScore >= 45 ? "Review required" : "Passed",
    representativeFinding:
      rows.map(getReasoning).find((value) => value && value !== "No reasoning available.") ||
      "No reasoning available.",
  };
}

function buildFindingGroups(
  items: CampaignResultItem[],
  campaign?: CampaignSummary | null
): FindingGroup[] {
  const groups = new Map<string, CampaignResultItem[]>();

  items.forEach((item) => {
    const category = getCategory(item);
    const current = groups.get(category) || [];
    current.push(item);
    groups.set(category, current);
  });

  if (groups.size === 0) {
    (campaign?.selected_categories || []).forEach((category) => {
      groups.set(category, []);
    });
  }

  return Array.from(groups.entries()).map(([category, rows]) => {
    const riskScores = rows.map(getRiskScore).filter(Number.isFinite);
    const highestRiskScore = riskScores.length > 0 ? Math.max(...riskScores) : 0;
    const severities = rows.map((row) => getSeverity(row));
    const severity =
      severities.find((value) => value.toLowerCase() === "critical") ||
      severities.find((value) => value.toLowerCase() === "high") ||
      severityFromScore(highestRiskScore);

    return {
      category,
      severity,
      highestRiskScore,
      affectedModels: unique(
        rows
          .map((row) =>
            getFirstString(row, [
              ["model_name"],
              ["target_model"],
              ["model"],
              ["model_id"],
              ["provider_model"],
            ])
          )
          .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value))
      ),
      affectedTests: rows.length,
      attackSuccesses: rows.filter((row) => getAttackSuccess(row) === true).length,
      criticalFindings: rows.filter((row) => getSeverity(row).toLowerCase() === "critical").length,
      evidence: rows.map(getReasoning).find((value) => value !== "No reasoning available.") || "No detailed evidence available.",
    };
  });
}

function buildRiskSummary(
  campaign: CampaignSummary | null,
  modelSummaries: ModelSummary[],
  findingGroups: FindingGroup[]
) {
  const averageRiskScore =
    Number(campaign?.average_risk_score || 0) ||
    average(modelSummaries.map((model) => model.averageRiskScore));

  const highestRiskScore =
    findingGroups.length > 0
      ? Math.max(...findingGroups.map((group) => group.highestRiskScore))
      : modelSummaries.length > 0
        ? Math.max(...modelSummaries.map((model) => model.highestRiskScore))
        : averageRiskScore;

  const criticalFindings =
    Number(campaign?.critical_findings || 0) ||
    findingGroups.reduce((sum, group) => sum + group.criticalFindings, 0) ||
    modelSummaries.reduce((sum, model) => sum + model.criticalFindings, 0);

  const attackSuccessCount =
    findingGroups.reduce((sum, group) => sum + group.attackSuccesses, 0) ||
    modelSummaries.reduce((sum, model) => sum + model.attackSuccessCount, 0);

  const sortedByRisk = [...modelSummaries].sort(
    (a, b) => a.averageRiskScore - b.averageRiskScore
  );

  return {
    averageRiskScore,
    highestRiskScore,
    criticalFindings,
    attackSuccessCount,
    bestModel: sortedByRisk[0]?.modelName || "Not available",
    highestRiskModel:
      sortedByRisk.length > 0
        ? sortedByRisk[sortedByRisk.length - 1].modelName
        : "Not available",
  };
}

function buildRecommendations(
  summary: ReturnType<typeof buildRiskSummary>,
  modelSummaries: ModelSummary[],
  findingGroups: FindingGroup[]
): Recommendation[] {
  const recommendations: Recommendation[] = [];

  findingGroups.forEach((group) => {
    const priority = priorityFromGroup(group);
    const actions = actionsForCategory(group.category, priority);

    recommendations.push({
      title: `${group.category} defense plan`,
      priority,
      category: group.category,
      affectedModels: group.affectedModels.length > 0 ? group.affectedModels : modelSummaries.map((model) => model.modelName),
      reason:
        group.affectedTests > 0
          ? `${group.affectedTests} test result(s) were associated with this category. Highest detected risk score: ${Math.round(group.highestRiskScore)}.`
          : "This category was selected in the campaign, so baseline defensive controls should be prepared.",
      actions,
      validation: validationForCategory(group.category),
    });
  });

  if (summary.criticalFindings > 0 || summary.highestRiskScore >= 70) {
    recommendations.unshift({
      title: "Immediate critical-risk escalation",
      priority: "Critical",
      category: "Overall Risk",
      affectedModels: modelSummaries.map((model) => model.modelName),
      reason:
        "The latest campaign includes critical or high-risk behavior that should be reviewed before production approval.",
      actions: [
        "Block production rollout until critical prompts pass regression testing.",
        "Create a test case for every high-risk finding and rerun it after fixes.",
        "Require human review for any workflow using the affected model categories.",
      ],
      validation:
        "Rerun the same campaign and confirm critical findings are zero and risk scores are below the approved threshold.",
    });
  }

  if (modelSummaries.length > 1 && summary.bestModel !== "Not available") {
    recommendations.push({
      title: "Use safest model as the comparison baseline",
      priority: "Medium",
      category: "Model Selection",
      affectedModels: [summary.bestModel],
      reason: `${summary.bestModel} currently has the lowest average risk score in the latest campaign.`,
      actions: [
        "Use this model as the baseline when evaluating future model/provider changes.",
        "Compare higher-risk models against the same prompt set before approval.",
        "Track risk deltas between model versions in future reports.",
      ],
      validation:
        "Repeat the campaign after model or policy changes and confirm the selected baseline remains stable.",
    });
  }

  recommendations.push({
    title: "Export and archive evidence",
    priority: "Low",
    category: "Reporting",
    affectedModels: modelSummaries.map((model) => model.modelName),
    reason:
      "The latest campaign report should be retained as audit evidence and used for client-ready documentation.",
    actions: [
      "Download the JSON report from Reports.",
      "Attach the findings and recommendations to the final client report.",
      "Keep the campaign ID and tested model list in the audit record.",
    ],
    validation:
      "Confirm the exported report includes campaign status, model summaries, finding groups, and recommendations.",
  });

  return recommendations;
}

function priorityFromGroup(group: FindingGroup): Recommendation["priority"] {
  if (
    group.severity.toLowerCase() === "critical" ||
    group.highestRiskScore >= 70 ||
    group.criticalFindings > 0
  ) {
    return "Critical";
  }

  if (
    group.severity.toLowerCase() === "high" ||
    group.highestRiskScore >= 45 ||
    group.attackSuccesses > 0
  ) {
    return "High";
  }

  if (group.highestRiskScore >= 25 || group.affectedTests > 0) {
    return "Medium";
  }

  return "Low";
}

function actionsForCategory(category: string, priority: Recommendation["priority"]) {
  const normalized = category.toLowerCase();

  if (normalized.includes("prompt injection")) {
    return [
      "Add strict system instruction boundaries and refuse user attempts to override hidden policies.",
      "Run input classification before model execution and block prompt-injection patterns.",
      "Add regression tests for direct, indirect, and role-play injection attempts.",
    ];
  }

  if (normalized.includes("system prompt") || normalized.includes("leak")) {
    return [
      "Add output filters for system prompt disclosure, hidden policy text, and internal configuration leaks.",
      "Reduce sensitive policy wording exposed to the model context where possible.",
      "Add canary phrases and automated checks to detect prompt leakage.",
    ];
  }

  if (normalized.includes("rag")) {
    return [
      "Sanitize retrieved documents before they are inserted into the model context.",
      "Separate user content, retrieved content, and system instructions with clear trust boundaries.",
      "Add retrieval-source validation and block documents that contain instructions to the model.",
    ];
  }

  if (normalized.includes("jailbreak")) {
    return [
      "Add refusal consistency tests for role-play, coercion, emotional pressure, and policy bypass attempts.",
      "Strengthen output evaluation with a second-stage safety judge.",
      "Require escalation for any jailbreak-like response that produces unsafe instructions.",
    ];
  }

  if (normalized.includes("data") || normalized.includes("exfiltration")) {
    return [
      "Mask sensitive data before model input and scan output for secrets or identifiers.",
      "Add allowlist-based output rules for sensitive workflows.",
      "Log and review any response that attempts to reveal credentials, keys, or private user data.",
    ];
  }

  return [
    priority === "Critical"
      ? "Create an immediate remediation ticket and block release until retesting passes."
      : "Create a remediation task for this finding category.",
    "Add this category to the recurring automated regression campaign.",
    "Document expected safe behavior and compare it against the model response.",
  ];
}

function validationForCategory(category: string) {
  const normalized = category.toLowerCase();

  if (normalized.includes("prompt injection")) {
    return "Rerun prompt-injection scenarios and confirm the model ignores instruction override attempts.";
  }

  if (normalized.includes("system prompt") || normalized.includes("leak")) {
    return "Rerun leakage scenarios and confirm no hidden prompt, system policy, or internal configuration is disclosed.";
  }

  if (normalized.includes("rag")) {
    return "Rerun RAG injection scenarios with untrusted documents and confirm retrieved text cannot control model behavior.";
  }

  if (normalized.includes("jailbreak")) {
    return "Rerun jailbreak scenarios and confirm unsafe requests are refused consistently.";
  }

  return "Rerun the same campaign and confirm risk scores decrease with no critical findings.";
}

function Panel({
  eyebrow,
  title,
  description,
  children,
}: {
  eyebrow: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  children: ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <section className="rounded-[22px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-[#4ad7ff]">{eyebrow}</p>
      <h2 className="mt-2 text-2xl font-bold">{title}</h2>
      <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">{description}</p>
      <div className="mt-6">{children}</div>
    </section>
  );
}

function SummaryCard({
  label,
  value,
  tone,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  tone: Tone;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className={`mt-3 truncate text-xl font-bold ${toneTextClass(tone)}`}>{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function DetailCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[16px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-4">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className="mt-2 break-words font-semibold text-white">{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function MetricBox({
  label,
  value,
  tone,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  tone: Tone;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className={`mt-3 text-3xl font-bold ${toneTextClass(tone)}`}>{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function HighlightCard({
  label,
  value,
  description,
  tone,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description: string;
  tone: Tone;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className={`mt-2 text-2xl font-bold ${toneTextClass(tone)}`}>{value}</p>
      <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">{description}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function ModelSummaryCard({ model }: { model: ModelSummary }) {
  const tone = riskTone(model.highestRiskScore || model.averageRiskScore);

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{model.modelName}</h3>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-[#8f8f8f]">{model.provider}</p>
        </div>

        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {model.severity}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div className="mt-5 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
        <MiniMetric label="Total Tests" value={String(model.totalTests)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Passed" value={String(model.passedTests)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Failed" value={String(model.failedTests)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Attack Successes" value={String(model.attackSuccessCount)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Avg Risk" value={String(Math.round(model.averageRiskScore))} />
        <MiniMetric label="Max Risk" value={String(Math.round(model.highestRiskScore))} />
      </div>

      <p className="mt-4 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">
        <span className="font-semibold text-[#4ad7ff]">Summary:</span>{" "}
        {model.finalStatus}. {model.representativeFinding}
      </p>
    </article>
  );
}

function FindingGroupCard({ group }: { group: FindingGroup }) {
  const tone = riskTone(group.highestRiskScore);

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#27292a] p-4">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">{group.category}</p>
          <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-[#8f8f8f]">
            {group.affectedTests} tests · {group.affectedModels.length || 0} models
          </p>
        </div>

        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {group.severity}
        </span>
      </div>
    </article>
  );
}

function ResultItemCard({ item, index }: { item: CampaignResultItem; index: number }) {
  const modelName =
    getFirstString(item, [["model_name"], ["target_model"], ["model"], ["model_id"]]) ||
    "Unknown model";

  const severity = getSeverity(item);
  const riskScore = getRiskScore(item);
  const tone = riskTone(riskScore);

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-4">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">
            #{index + 1} · {modelName}
          </p>
          <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-[#8f8f8f]">{getCategory(item)}</p>
        </div>

        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {severity} · {Math.round(riskScore)}
        </span>
      </div>

      <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">{getReasoning(item)}</p>
    </article>
  );
}

function MiniMetric({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[14px] bg-[#27292a] p-3">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className="mt-1 font-bold text-white">{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function RecommendationCard({ item }: { item: Recommendation }) {
  const tone = priorityTone(item.priority);

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{item.title}</h3>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-[#8f8f8f]">
            {item.category} · Affected models: {item.affectedModels.length > 0 ? item.affectedModels.join(", ") : "N/A"}
          </p>
        </div>

        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {item.priority}
        </span>
      </div>

      <p className="mt-4 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">{item.reason}</p>

      <div className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#27292a] p-4">
        <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">
          Recommended actions
        </p>
        <ul className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">
          {item.actions.map((action) => (
            <li key={action} className="flex gap-2">
              <span className="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-[#4ad7ff]" />
              <span>{action}</span>
            </li>
          ))}
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-[#30d158]/20 bg-[#30d158]/10 p-4">
        <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#30d158]">
          Validation
        </p>
        <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">{item.validation}</p>
      </div>
    </article>
  );
}

function LoadingState() {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-6 text-sm text-[#a9a9a9]">
      Loading latest backend campaign report...
    </div>
  );
}

  title = "No latest campaign report available",
  message = "Run an automated campaign first, then return to Reports.",
}: {
  title?: string;
  message?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-6">
      <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white">{title}</h3>
      <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">{message}</p>

      <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3">
        <a
          href="/campaigns"
          className="rounded-full bg-[#ff3434] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-[#ff4b4b]"
        >
          Run Campaign
        </a>
        <a
          href="/blue-team"
          className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#27292a] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#30d158]/45 hover:text-[#30d158]"
        >
          Legacy Blue Team
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

type Tone = "critical" | "high" | "medium" | "low" | "neutral" | "cyan";

function riskTone(score: number): Tone {
  if (score >= 70) return "critical";
  if (score >= 45) return "high";
  if (score >= 25) return "medium";
  return "low";
}

function priorityTone(priority: Recommendation["priority"]): Tone {
  if (priority === "Critical") return "critical";
  if (priority === "High") return "high";
  if (priority === "Medium") return "medium";
  return "low";
}

function statusTone(status?: string): Tone {
  const normalized = String(status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (normalized.includes("fail")) return "critical";
  if (normalized.includes("complete")) return "low";
  if (normalized.includes("run") || normalized.includes("queue")) return "cyan";
  return "neutral";
}

function severityFromScore(score: number) {
  if (score >= 70) return "Critical";
  if (score >= 45) return "High";
  if (score >= 25) return "Medium";
  return "Low";
}

function toneTextClass(tone: Tone) {
  return {
    critical: "text-[#ff3434]",
    high: "text-[#ffb347]",
    medium: "text-[#ffd166]",
    low: "text-[#30d158]",
    neutral: "text-white",
    cyan: "text-[#4ad7ff]",
  }[tone];
}

function toneBadgeClass(tone: Tone) {
  return {
    critical: "border-[#ff3434]/35 bg-[#ff3434]/10 text-[#ff3434]",
    high: "border-[#ffb347]/35 bg-[#ffb347]/10 text-[#ffb347]",
    medium: "border-[#ffd166]/35 bg-[#ffd166]/10 text-[#ffd166]",
    low: "border-[#30d158]/35 bg-[#30d158]/10 text-[#30d158]",
    neutral: "border-white/[0.12] bg-white/[0.06] text-[#d4d4d4]",
    cyan: "border-[#4ad7ff]/35 bg-[#4ad7ff]/10 text-[#4ad7ff]",
  }[tone];
}

function sourceLabel(value?: string | null) {
  if (!value) return "Library assets";
  return value
    .split("_")
    .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
    .join(" ");
}

function average(values: number[]) {
  const valid = values.filter(Number.isFinite);
  return valid.length ? valid.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / valid.length : 0;
}

function numberValue(value: unknown) {
  const parsed = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : 0;
}

function unique(values: string[]) {
  return Array.from(new Set(values));
}

function toRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  if (typeof value !== "object" || value === null || Array.isArray(value)) {
    return null;
  }

  return value as Record<string, unknown>;
}

function getPath(value: unknown, path: string[]): unknown {
  let current: unknown = value;

  for (const key of path) {
    const record = toRecord(current);
    if (!record) return undefined;
    current = record[key];
  }

  return current;
}

function getFirstString(value: unknown, paths: string[][]): string | null {
  for (const path of paths) {
    const current = getPath(value, path);

    if (typeof current === "string" && current.trim()) return current;
    if (typeof current === "number") return String(current);
    if (typeof current === "boolean") return current ? "Yes" : "No";
  }

  return null;
}

function getFirstNumber(value: unknown, paths: string[][], fallback = 0): number {
  for (const path of paths) {
    const current = getPath(value, path);
    const parsed = Number(current);

    if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
  }

  return fallback;
}

function getFirstBoolean(value: unknown, paths: string[][]): boolean | null {
  for (const path of paths) {
    const current = getPath(value, path);

    if (typeof current === "boolean") return current;

    if (typeof current === "string") {
      const normalized = current.toLowerCase();
      if (["true", "yes", "success", "passed"].includes(normalized)) return true;
      if (["false", "no", "failed", "blocked"].includes(normalized)) return false;
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function getRiskScore(value: unknown) {
  return getFirstNumber(value, [
    ["risk_score"],
    ["average_risk_score"],
    ["score"],
    ["risk_assessment", "risk_score"],
    ["input_evaluation", "risk_score"],
    ["output_evaluation", "risk_score"],
  ]);
}

function getSeverity(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["severity"],
      ["risk_level"],
      ["risk_assessment", "severity"],
      ["input_evaluation", "risk_level"],
      ["output_evaluation", "severity"],
    ]) || severityFromScore(getRiskScore(value))
  );
}

function getAttackSuccess(value: unknown) {
  return getFirstBoolean(value, [
    ["attack_success"],
    ["jailbreak_success"],
    ["success"],
    ["output_evaluation", "attack_success"],
  ]);
}

function getFinalStatus(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["final_status"],
      ["status"],
      ["verdict"],
      ["output_evaluation", "final_status"],
    ]) || "Unknown"
  );
}

function getReasoning(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["reasoning"],
      ["summary"],
      ["analysis"],
      ["output_evaluation", "reasoning"],
      ["risk_assessment", "reasoning"],
    ]) || "No reasoning available."
  );
}

function getCategory(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["category"],
      ["scenario_category"],
      ["attack_category"],
      ["owasp_category"],
      ["scenario", "category"],
      ["attack_scenario", "category"],
      ["input_evaluation", "category"],
      ["output_evaluation", "category"],
    ]) || "General AI Risk"
  );
}

FILE: frontend/src/app/reports/page.step5-before-merge.bak
