"use client";

import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { clearLatestReport, loadLatestReport } from "@/lib/hexaguardApi";

export default function ReportsPage() {
  const [savedReport, setSavedReport] = useState<any>(null);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    setSavedReport(loadLatestReport());
  }, []);

  const report = savedReport?.report;
  const reportType = savedReport?.type;

  function handleCopyJson() {
    if (!savedReport) return;

    navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(savedReport, null, 2));
    setMessage("Report JSON copied to clipboard.");
  }

  function handleDownloadJson() {
    if (!savedReport) return;

    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(savedReport, null, 2)], {
      type: "application/json",
    });

    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement("a");

    link.href = url;
    link.download = `hexaguard-report-${savedReport.type}-${Date.now()}.json`;
    link.click();

    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    setMessage("Report downloaded as JSON.");
  }

  function handleClear() {
    clearLatestReport();
    setSavedReport(null);
    setMessage("Latest report cleared.");
  }

  return (
    <main className="hxg-background min-h-screen p-8 text-white">
      <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl space-y-6">
        <section className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
          <p className="text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-cyan-400">
            HEXAGUARD Reports
          </p>

          <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold">
            Report Viewer & Export Center
          </h1>

          <p className="mt-3 text-[#d4d4d4]">
            View the latest generated HEXAGUARD report, copy it, or download it
            as a JSON file for documentation and presentation.
          </p>
        </section>

        {!savedReport && (
          <section className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">No report available yet</h2>
            <p className="mt-3 text-[#a9a9a9]">
              Run a test from Sandbox, Model Comparison, or Dataset Testing first.
            </p>

            <div className="mt-5 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3">
              <a
                href="/sandbox"
                className="rounded-[14px] bg-cyan-500 px-5 py-3 text-center font-bold text-slate-950 hover:bg-cyan-400"
              >
                Open Sandbox
              </a>
              <a
                href="/compare"
                className="rounded-[14px] border border-[#353637] px-5 py-3 text-center font-bold text-white hover:bg-[#303234]"
              >
                Open Compare
              </a>
              <a
                href="/datasets"
                className="rounded-[14px] border border-[#353637] px-5 py-3 text-center font-bold text-white hover:bg-[#303234]"
              >
                Open Datasets
              </a>
            </div>
          </section>
        )}

        {savedReport && (
          <>
            <section className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4">
              <MetricCard label="Report Type" value={reportType || "Unknown"} />
              <MetricCard
                label="Saved At"
                value={new Date(savedReport.saved_at).toLocaleString()}
              />
              <MetricCard
                label="Final Status"
                value={
                  report?.final_status ||
                  report?.risk_summary ||
                  "Batch / Comparison Report"
                }
              />
              <MetricCard
                label="Total Reports"
                value={String(
                  report?.reports?.length ||
                    Object.keys(report?.results || {}).length ||
                    1
                )}
              />
            </section>

            <section className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Report Actions</h2>

                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
                  <button
                    onClick={handleCopyJson}
                    className="rounded-[14px] bg-cyan-500 px-4 py-2 font-bold text-slate-950 hover:bg-cyan-400"
                  >
                    Copy JSON
                  </button>

                  <button
                    onClick={handleDownloadJson}
                    className="rounded-[14px] border border-[#353637] px-4 py-2 font-bold hover:bg-[#303234]"
                  >
                    Download JSON
                  </button>

                  <button
                    onClick={handleClear}
                    className="rounded-[14px] border border-red-800 bg-red-950 px-4 py-2 font-bold text-[#ff3434] hover:bg-red-900"
                  >
                    Clear
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              {message && (
                <div className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#1f2122] p-4 text-white">
                  {message}
                </div>
              )}
            </section>

            <section className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
              <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Executive Summary</h2>

                <div className="mt-5 space-y-4">
                  {report?.risk_assessment && (
                    <>
                      <InfoRow
                        label="Risk Score"
                        value={String(report.risk_assessment.risk_score)}
                      />
                      <InfoRow
                        label="Severity"
                        value={report.risk_assessment.severity}
                      />
                      <InfoRow
                        label="Confidence"
                        value={report.risk_assessment.confidence}
                      />
                    </>
                  )}

                  {report?.safest_summary && (
                    <InfoBox title="Safest Summary">
                      {report.safest_summary}
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}

                  {report?.risk_summary && (
                    <InfoBox title="Risk Summary">{report.risk_summary}</InfoBox>
                  )}

                  {report?.output_evaluation?.reasoning && (
                    <InfoBox title="Judge Reasoning">
                      {report.output_evaluation.reasoning}
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}

                  {report?.model_response?.output && (
                    <InfoBox title="Model Response">
                      <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap font-sans text-sm">
                        {report.model_response.output}
                      </pre>
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Security Findings</h2>

                <div className="mt-5 space-y-4">
                  {report?.owasp_mapping && (
                    <InfoBox title="OWASP Mapping">
                      <ul className="list-disc space-y-1 pl-5">
                        {report.owasp_mapping.map((item: any, index: number) => (
                          <li key={index}>
                            {item.id} — {item.name}
                          </li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}

                  {report?.blue_team_recommendation && (
                    <InfoBox title="Blue Team Recommendations">
                      <ul className="list-disc space-y-1 pl-5">
                        {report.blue_team_recommendation.map(
                          (item: string, index: number) => (
                            <li key={index}>{item}</li>
                          )
                        )}
                      </ul>
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}

                  {report?.reports && (
                    <InfoBox title="Dataset Batch Reports">
                      <div className="space-y-3">
                        {report.reports.map((item: any, index: number) => (
                          <div
                            key={item.test_id || index}
                            className="rounded-[12px] bg-[#27292a] p-3"
                          >
                            <p className="font-semibold text-[#4ad7ff]">
                              {index + 1}. {item.attack_scenario}
                            </p>
                            <p className="text-sm text-[#d4d4d4]">
                              Status: {item.final_status}
                            </p>
                            <p className="text-sm text-[#d4d4d4]">
                              Risk Score: {item.risk_assessment?.risk_score}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}

                  {report?.results && (
                    <InfoBox title="Model Comparison Results">
                      <div className="space-y-3">
                        {Object.entries(report.results).map(
                          ([modelName, item]: any) => (
                            <div
                              key={modelName}
                              className="rounded-[12px] bg-[#27292a] p-3"
                            >
                              <p className="font-semibold text-[#4ad7ff]">
                                {modelName}
                              </p>
                              <p className="text-sm text-[#d4d4d4]">
                                Status: {item.final_status}
                              </p>
                              <p className="text-sm text-[#d4d4d4]">
                                Risk Score: {item.risk_assessment?.risk_score}
                              </p>
                            </div>
                          )
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </InfoBox>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </section>

            <section className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Raw JSON Report</h2>
              <pre className="mt-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-auto rounded-[14px] bg-[#1f2122] p-4 text-xs text-[#d4d4d4]">
                {JSON.stringify(savedReport, null, 2)}
              </pre>
            </section>
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </main>
  );
}

function MetricCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className="mt-2 break-words font-bold text-white">{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function InfoRow({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[14px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#1f2122] p-4">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className="mt-2 font-bold text-white">{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function InfoBox({
  title,
  children,
}: {
  title: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[14px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#1f2122] p-4">
      <h3 className="font-semibold text-cyan-400">{title}</h3>
      <div className="mt-2 text-white">{children}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

============================================================
FILE: frontend/src/app/reports/page.step5-recommendations-before.bak
============================================================
"use client";

import { type ReactNode, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";

const API_BASE_URL = (
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_HEXAGUARD_API_URL ||
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ||
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ||
  "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1"
).replace(/\/$/, "");

type ReportTabKey = "results" | "risk" | "comparison" | "recommendations";

type CampaignListResponse = {
  total?: number;
  limit?: number;
  offset?: number;
  items?: CampaignSummary[];
};

type CampaignSummary = {
  id?: number;
  campaign_id: string;
  name?: string;
  description?: string | null;
  status?: string;
  test_source_type?: string | null;
  dataset_id?: string | null;
  dataset_name?: string | null;
  dataset_row_count?: number;
  selected_models?: string[];
  selected_scenario_ids?: string[];
  selected_categories?: string[];
  selected_mutations?: string[];
  max_tests?: number;
  total_tests?: number;
  completed_tests?: number;
  failed_tests?: number;
  critical_findings?: number;
  average_risk_score?: number;
  created_at?: string;
  started_at?: string | null;
  completed_at?: string | null;
};

type CampaignStatus = CampaignSummary & {
  progress_percent?: number;
};

type CampaignResultsResponse = {
  campaign_id?: string;
  total?: number;
  items?: CampaignResultItem[];
};

type CampaignResultItem = Record<string, unknown>;

type ModelSummary = {
  modelName: string;
  provider: string;
  totalTests: number;
  passedTests: number;
  failedTests: number;
  attackSuccessCount: number;
  criticalFindings: number;
  averageRiskScore: number;
  highestRiskScore: number;
  severity: string;
  finalStatus: string;
  representativeFinding: string;
};

type Recommendation = {
  title: string;
  priority: "Critical" | "High" | "Medium" | "Low";
  description: string;
};

const REPORT_TABS: Array<{
  key: ReportTabKey;
  label: string;
  description: string;
}> = [
  {
    key: "results",
    label: "Test Results",
    description: "Final campaign status, tested inputs, and stored evidence.",
  },
  {
    key: "risk",
    label: "Risk Scores",
    description: "Risk score, severity, attack success, and critical findings.",
  },
  {
    key: "comparison",
    label: "Model Comparison",
    description: "Model-by-model campaign summary from the latest backend run.",
  },
  {
    key: "recommendations",
    label: "Recommendations",
    description: "Blue Team actions based on the latest campaign findings.",
  },
];

export default function ReportsPage() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<ReportTabKey>("results");
  const [latestCampaign, setLatestCampaign] = useState<CampaignSummary | null>(null);
  const [campaignStatus, setCampaignStatus] = useState<CampaignStatus | null>(null);
  const [campaignResults, setCampaignResults] = useState<CampaignResultsResponse | null>(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState("");
  const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = useState("");

  const loadLatestCampaignReport = useCallback(async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrorMessage("");
    setMessage("");

    try {
      const listResponse = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns?limit=1&offset=0`, {
        headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
        cache: "no-store",
      });

      const listData = await parseApiResponse<CampaignListResponse>(listResponse);
      const campaign = Array.isArray(listData.items) ? listData.items[0] : null;

      if (!campaign?.campaign_id) {
        setLatestCampaign(null);
        setCampaignStatus(null);
        setCampaignResults(null);
        setMessage("No backend campaign results are available yet.");
        return;
      }

      const [statusResponse, resultsResponse] = await Promise.all([
        fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns/${campaign.campaign_id}/status`, {
          headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
          cache: "no-store",
        }),
        fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/campaigns/${campaign.campaign_id}/results`, {
          headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
          cache: "no-store",
        }),
      ]);

      const statusData = await parseApiResponse<CampaignStatus>(statusResponse);
      const resultsData = await parseApiResponse<CampaignResultsResponse>(resultsResponse);

      setLatestCampaign(campaign);
      setCampaignStatus(statusData);
      setCampaignResults(resultsData);
      setMessage(`Loaded latest campaign: ${campaign.campaign_id}`);
    } catch (error) {
      setLatestCampaign(null);
      setCampaignStatus(null);
      setCampaignResults(null);
      setErrorMessage(
        error instanceof Error
          ? error.message
          : "Unable to load latest campaign report."
      );
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadLatestCampaignReport();
  }, [loadLatestCampaignReport]);

  const resultItems = campaignResults?.items || [];

  const modelSummaries = useMemo(
    () => buildModelSummaries(resultItems, campaignStatus || latestCampaign),
    [resultItems, campaignStatus, latestCampaign]
  );

  const riskSummary = useMemo(
    () => buildRiskSummary(campaignStatus || latestCampaign, modelSummaries),
    [campaignStatus, latestCampaign, modelSummaries]
  );

  const recommendations = useMemo(
    () => buildRecommendations(riskSummary, modelSummaries),
    [riskSummary, modelSummaries]
  );

  const exportPayload = useMemo(
    () => ({
      source: "HexaGuard Reports",
      loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      latest_campaign: latestCampaign,
      status: campaignStatus,
      results: campaignResults,
      model_summaries: modelSummaries,
      recommendations,
    }),
    [latestCampaign, campaignStatus, campaignResults, modelSummaries, recommendations]
  );

  function copyJson() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(exportPayload, null, 2));
    setMessage("Latest campaign report copied as JSON.");
  }

  function downloadJson() {
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(exportPayload, null, 2)], {
      type: "application/json",
    });

    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    const campaignId = latestCampaign?.campaign_id || "latest";

    link.href = url;
    link.download = `hexaguard-campaign-report-${campaignId}.json`;
    link.click();

    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    setMessage("Latest campaign report downloaded as JSON.");
  }

  return (
    <main className="hxg-background min-h-screen p-8 text-white">
      <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl space-y-6">
        <section className="rounded-[22px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6 shadow-[0_24px_70px_rgba(0,0,0,0.32)]">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-5">
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-[#4ad7ff]">
                HEXAGUARD Reports
              </p>

              <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold">
                Final Analysis Center
              </h1>

              <p className="mt-3 max-w-3xl text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">
                Reports now reads the latest backend campaign, summarizes final
                results, compares tested models, and prepares Blue Team
                recommendations.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={loadLatestCampaignReport}
                className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/50 hover:text-[#4ad7ff]"
              >
                Refresh Latest Campaign
              </button>

              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={copyJson}
                disabled={!latestCampaign}
                className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/50 hover:text-[#4ad7ff] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-45"
              >
                Copy JSON
              </button>

              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={downloadJson}
                disabled={!latestCampaign}
                className="rounded-full bg-[#ff3434] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-[#ff4b4b] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-45"
              >
                Download JSON
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {message && (
            <p className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-[#4ad7ff]/25 bg-[#4ad7ff]/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#4ad7ff]">
              {message}
            </p>
          )}

          {errorMessage && (
            <p className="mt-4 rounded-[14px] border border-[#ff3434]/35 bg-[#ff3434]/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#ff8c8c]">
              {errorMessage}
            </p>
          )}
        </section>

        <section className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4">
          <SummaryCard
            label="Latest Campaign"
            value={latestCampaign?.campaign_id || "No campaign"}
            tone="cyan"
          />
          <SummaryCard
            label="Status"
            value={campaignStatus?.status || latestCampaign?.status || "N/A"}
            tone={statusTone(campaignStatus?.status || latestCampaign?.status)}
          />
          <SummaryCard
            label="Tests"
            value={`${numberValue(campaignStatus?.completed_tests || latestCampaign?.completed_tests)}/${numberValue(campaignStatus?.total_tests || latestCampaign?.total_tests)}`}
            tone="neutral"
          />
          <SummaryCard
            label="Overall Risk"
            value={String(Math.round(riskSummary.averageRiskScore))}
            tone={riskTone(riskSummary.averageRiskScore)}
          />
        </section>

        <section className="rounded-[22px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-4">
          <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-4">
            {REPORT_TABS.map((tab) => {
              const isActive = activeTab === tab.key;

              return (
                <button
                  key={tab.key}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
                  className={`rounded-[18px] border p-4 text-left transition ${
                    isActive
                      ? "border-[#ff3434]/55 bg-[#ff3434]/12"
                      : "border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/35"
                  }`}
                >
                  <p className={`text-sm font-bold ${isActive ? "text-white" : "text-[#d4d4d4]"}`}>
                    {tab.label}
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-xs leading-5 text-[#8f8f8f]">
                    {tab.description}
                  </p>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </section>

        {activeTab === "results" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Test Results"
            title="Latest Campaign Results"
            description="Answers: What are the final results? What evidence can I export?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : (
              <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[0.75fr_1.25fr]">
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <DetailCard label="Campaign ID" value={latestCampaign.campaign_id} />
                  <DetailCard label="Name" value={latestCampaign.name || "Automated Red Team Campaign"} />
                  <DetailCard label="Source" value={sourceLabel(latestCampaign.test_source_type)} />
                  <DetailCard label="Categories" value={(latestCampaign.selected_categories || []).join(", ") || "N/A"} />
                  <DetailCard label="Models" value={(latestCampaign.selected_models || []).join(", ") || "N/A"} />
                  <DetailCard label="Completed At" value={latestCampaign.completed_at || campaignStatus?.completed_at || "N/A"} />
                </div>

                <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#151718] p-5">
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <div>
                      <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">
                        Stored Result Items
                      </h3>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-[#8f8f8f]">
                        {resultItems.length} backend result records found.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-4 max-h-[440px] space-y-3 overflow-auto pr-1">
                    {resultItems.length === 0 ? (
                      <p className="rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-4 text-sm text-[#a9a9a9]">
                        No campaign result rows were returned for this campaign.
                      </p>
                    ) : (
                      resultItems.slice(0, 20).map((item, index) => (
                        <ResultItemCard key={index} item={item} index={index} />
                      ))
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </Panel>
        )}

        {activeTab === "risk" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Risk Scores"
            title="Risk Score Summary"
            description="Answers: What risks were found and how severe are they?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : (
              <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
                <MetricBox
                  label="Average Risk"
                  value={String(Math.round(riskSummary.averageRiskScore))}
                  tone={riskTone(riskSummary.averageRiskScore)}
                />
                <MetricBox
                  label="Highest Risk"
                  value={String(Math.round(riskSummary.highestRiskScore))}
                  tone={riskTone(riskSummary.highestRiskScore)}
                />
                <MetricBox
                  label="Attack Successes"
                  value={String(riskSummary.attackSuccessCount)}
                  tone={riskSummary.attackSuccessCount > 0 ? "critical" : "low"}
                />
                <MetricBox
                  label="Critical Findings"
                  value={String(riskSummary.criticalFindings)}
                  tone={riskSummary.criticalFindings > 0 ? "critical" : "low"}
                />
              </div>
            )}
          </Panel>
        )}

        {activeTab === "comparison" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Model Comparison"
            title="Model-by-Model Summary"
            description="Answers: Which model performed best and which model had the highest risk?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : modelSummaries.length === 0 ? (
              <EmptyState
                title="No model-level result rows found"
                message="The latest campaign loaded, but no model-level result items were returned yet."
              />
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-5">
                <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
                  <HighlightCard
                    label="Best Performing Model"
                    value={riskSummary.bestModel}
                    description="Lowest average risk score in the latest campaign."
                    tone="low"
                  />
                  <HighlightCard
                    label="Highest Risk Model"
                    value={riskSummary.highestRiskModel}
                    description="Highest average risk score in the latest campaign."
                    tone={riskTone(riskSummary.highestRiskScore)}
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-2">
                  {modelSummaries.map((model) => (
                    <ModelSummaryCard key={model.modelName} model={model} />
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3">
              <a
                href="/compare"
                className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/45 hover:text-[#4ad7ff]"
              >
                Open legacy Compare page
              </a>
              <a
                href="/campaigns"
                className="rounded-full bg-[#ff3434] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-[#ff4b4b]"
              >
                Run another Campaign
              </a>
            </div>
          </Panel>
        )}

        {activeTab === "recommendations" && (
          <Panel
            eyebrow="Recommendations"
            title="Blue Team Recommendations"
            description="Answers: What recommendations should we follow?"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : !latestCampaign ? (
              <EmptyState />
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {recommendations.map((item, index) => (
                  <RecommendationCard key={`${item.title}-${index}`} item={item} />
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3">
              <a
                href="/blue-team"
                className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#1f2122] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#30d158]/45 hover:text-[#30d158]"
              >
                Open legacy Blue Team page
              </a>
            </div>
          </Panel>
        )}
      </div>
    </main>
  );
}

async function parseApiResponse<T>(response: Response): Promise<T> {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") || "";
  const isJson = contentType.includes("application/json");
  const payload = isJson ? await response.json() : await response.text();

  if (!response.ok) {
    const detail =
      typeof payload === "object" && payload !== null && "detail" in payload
        ? String((payload as { detail: unknown }).detail)
        : `Request failed with status ${response.status}`;

    throw new Error(detail);
  }

  return payload as T;
}

function buildModelSummaries(
  items: CampaignResultItem[],
  campaign?: CampaignSummary | null
): ModelSummary[] {
  const selectedModels = campaign?.selected_models || [];
  const groups = new Map<string, CampaignResultItem[]>();

  items.forEach((item) => {
    const modelName =
      getFirstString(item, [
        ["model_name"],
        ["target_model"],
        ["model"],
        ["model_id"],
        ["provider_model"],
        ["target_model_id"],
      ]) || "Unknown model";

    const current = groups.get(modelName) || [];
    current.push(item);
    groups.set(modelName, current);
  });

  selectedModels.forEach((modelName) => {
    if (!groups.has(modelName)) groups.set(modelName, []);
  });

  return Array.from(groups.entries()).map(([modelName, rows]) =>
    summarizeModel(modelName, rows)
  );
}

function summarizeModel(modelName: string, rows: CampaignResultItem[]): ModelSummary {
  const riskScores = rows.map(getRiskScore).filter(Number.isFinite);
  const averageRiskScore =
    riskScores.length > 0
      ? riskScores.reduce((sum, score) => sum + score, 0) / riskScores.length
      : 0;

  const highestRiskScore = riskScores.length > 0 ? Math.max(...riskScores) : 0;

  const attackSuccessCount = rows.filter((row) => getAttackSuccess(row) === true).length;
  const criticalFindings = rows.filter((row) => getSeverity(row).toLowerCase() === "critical").length;
  const failedTests = rows.filter((row) => getFinalStatus(row).toLowerCase().includes("fail")).length;
  const passedTests = rows.length > 0 ? rows.length - failedTests : 0;

  return {
    modelName,
    provider: modelName.includes(":") ? modelName.split(":")[0] : "Unknown",
    totalTests: rows.length,
    passedTests,
    failedTests,
    attackSuccessCount,
    criticalFindings,
    averageRiskScore,
    highestRiskScore,
    severity: severityFromScore(highestRiskScore || averageRiskScore),
    finalStatus: attackSuccessCount > 0 || highestRiskScore >= 45 ? "Review required" : "Passed",
    representativeFinding:
      rows.map(getReasoning).find((value) => value && value !== "No reasoning available.") ||
      "No reasoning available.",
  };
}

function buildRiskSummary(
  campaign: CampaignSummary | null,
  modelSummaries: ModelSummary[]
) {
  const averageRiskScore =
    Number(campaign?.average_risk_score || 0) ||
    average(modelSummaries.map((model) => model.averageRiskScore));

  const highestRiskScore =
    modelSummaries.length > 0
      ? Math.max(...modelSummaries.map((model) => model.highestRiskScore))
      : averageRiskScore;

  const criticalFindings =
    Number(campaign?.critical_findings || 0) ||
    modelSummaries.reduce((sum, model) => sum + model.criticalFindings, 0);

  const attackSuccessCount = modelSummaries.reduce(
    (sum, model) => sum + model.attackSuccessCount,
    0
  );

  const sortedByRisk = [...modelSummaries].sort(
    (a, b) => a.averageRiskScore - b.averageRiskScore
  );

  return {
    averageRiskScore,
    highestRiskScore,
    criticalFindings,
    attackSuccessCount,
    bestModel: sortedByRisk[0]?.modelName || "Not available",
    highestRiskModel:
      sortedByRisk.length > 0
        ? sortedByRisk[sortedByRisk.length - 1].modelName
        : "Not available",
  };
}

function buildRecommendations(
  summary: ReturnType<typeof buildRiskSummary>,
  modelSummaries: ModelSummary[]
): Recommendation[] {
  const items: Recommendation[] = [];

  if (summary.criticalFindings > 0 || summary.highestRiskScore >= 70) {
    items.push({
      title: "Escalate critical findings",
      priority: "Critical",
      description:
        "Review critical outputs immediately and block release until the same prompts pass regression testing.",
    });
  }

  if (summary.attackSuccessCount > 0) {
    items.push({
      title: "Strengthen prompt and output guardrails",
      priority: "High",
      description:
        "At least one tested model showed attack success. Add stricter refusal checks, output scanning, and policy-based response validation.",
    });
  }

  if (modelSummaries.length > 1) {
    items.push({
      title: "Use the safest model as the baseline",
      priority: "Medium",
      description: `${summary.bestModel} currently has the lowest detected average risk. Use it as the baseline for future model comparison.`,
    });
  }

  if (summary.highestRiskModel !== "Not available") {
    items.push({
      title: "Review highest-risk model behavior",
      priority: "Medium",
      description: `${summary.highestRiskModel} showed the highest detected risk. Review its failed prompts, risky categories, and guardrail behavior.`,
    });
  }

  items.push({
    title: "Export the final report",
    priority: "Low",
    description:
      "Download or copy the report JSON so the latest campaign evidence can be archived or attached to a client report.",
  });

  return items;
}

function Panel({
  eyebrow,
  title,
  description,
  children,
}: {
  eyebrow: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  children: ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <section className="rounded-[22px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-6">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-[#4ad7ff]">{eyebrow}</p>
      <h2 className="mt-2 text-2xl font-bold">{title}</h2>
      <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">{description}</p>
      <div className="mt-6">{children}</div>
    </section>
  );
}

function SummaryCard({
  label,
  value,
  tone,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  tone: Tone;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-[#353637] bg-[#27292a] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className={`mt-3 truncate text-xl font-bold ${toneTextClass(tone)}`}>{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function DetailCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[16px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-4">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className="mt-2 break-words font-semibold text-white">{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function MetricBox({
  label,
  value,
  tone,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  tone: Tone;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className={`mt-3 text-3xl font-bold ${toneTextClass(tone)}`}>{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function HighlightCard({
  label,
  value,
  description,
  tone,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description: string;
  tone: Tone;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className={`mt-2 text-2xl font-bold ${toneTextClass(tone)}`}>{value}</p>
      <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">{description}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function ModelSummaryCard({ model }: { model: ModelSummary }) {
  const tone = riskTone(model.highestRiskScore || model.averageRiskScore);

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{model.modelName}</h3>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-[#8f8f8f]">{model.provider}</p>
        </div>

        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {model.severity}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div className="mt-5 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
        <MiniMetric label="Total Tests" value={String(model.totalTests)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Passed" value={String(model.passedTests)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Failed" value={String(model.failedTests)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Attack Successes" value={String(model.attackSuccessCount)} />
        <MiniMetric label="Avg Risk" value={String(Math.round(model.averageRiskScore))} />
        <MiniMetric label="Max Risk" value={String(Math.round(model.highestRiskScore))} />
      </div>

      <p className="mt-4 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">
        <span className="font-semibold text-[#4ad7ff]">Summary:</span>{" "}
        {model.finalStatus}. {model.representativeFinding}
      </p>
    </article>
  );
}

function ResultItemCard({ item, index }: { item: CampaignResultItem; index: number }) {
  const modelName =
    getFirstString(item, [["model_name"], ["target_model"], ["model"], ["model_id"]]) ||
    "Unknown model";

  const severity = getSeverity(item);
  const riskScore = getRiskScore(item);
  const tone = riskTone(riskScore);

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[14px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-4">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">
            #{index + 1} · {modelName}
          </p>
          <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-[#8f8f8f]">
            {getFirstString(item, [["category"], ["scenario_category"], ["attack_category"]]) ||
              "Campaign result"}
          </p>
        </div>

        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {severity} · {Math.round(riskScore)}
        </span>
      </div>

      <p className="mt-3 line-clamp-3 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">
        {getReasoning(item)}
      </p>
    </article>
  );
}

function MiniMetric({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[14px] bg-[#27292a] p-3">
      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-[#727272]">{label}</p>
      <p className="mt-1 font-bold text-white">{value}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

function RecommendationCard({ item }: { item: Recommendation }) {
  const tone =
    item.priority === "Critical"
      ? "critical"
      : item.priority === "High"
        ? "high"
        : item.priority === "Medium"
          ? "medium"
          : "low";

  return (
    <article className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-5">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{item.title}</h3>
        <span className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold ${toneBadgeClass(tone)}`}>
          {item.priority}
        </span>
      </div>

      <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-[#d4d4d4]">{item.description}</p>
    </article>
  );
}

function LoadingState() {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-6 text-sm text-[#a9a9a9]">
      Loading latest backend campaign report...
    </div>
  );
}

function EmptyState({
  title = "No latest campaign report available",
  message = "Run an automated campaign first, then return to Reports.",
}: {
  title?: string;
  message?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#1f2122] p-6">
      <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white">{title}</h3>
      <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-6 text-[#a9a9a9]">{message}</p>

      <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3">
        <a
          href="/campaigns"
          className="rounded-full bg-[#ff3434] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-[#ff4b4b]"
        >
          Run Campaign
        </a>
        <a
          href="/compare"
          className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.12] bg-[#27292a] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-[#4ad7ff]/45 hover:text-[#4ad7ff]"
        >
          Legacy Compare
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

type Tone = "critical" | "high" | "medium" | "low" | "neutral" | "cyan";

function riskTone(score: number): Tone {
  if (score >= 70) return "critical";
  if (score >= 45) return "high";
  if (score >= 25) return "medium";
  return "low";
}

function statusTone(status?: string): Tone {
  const normalized = String(status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (normalized.includes("fail")) return "critical";
  if (normalized.includes("complete")) return "low";
  if (normalized.includes("run") || normalized.includes("queue")) return "cyan";
  return "neutral";
}

function severityFromScore(score: number) {
  if (score >= 70) return "Critical";
  if (score >= 45) return "High";
  if (score >= 25) return "Medium";
  return "Low";
}

function toneTextClass(tone: Tone) {
  return {
    critical: "text-[#ff3434]",
    high: "text-[#ffb347]",
    medium: "text-[#ffd166]",
    low: "text-[#30d158]",
    neutral: "text-white",
    cyan: "text-[#4ad7ff]",
  }[tone];
}

function toneBadgeClass(tone: Tone) {
  return {
    critical: "border-[#ff3434]/35 bg-[#ff3434]/10 text-[#ff3434]",
    high: "border-[#ffb347]/35 bg-[#ffb347]/10 text-[#ffb347]",
    medium: "border-[#ffd166]/35 bg-[#ffd166]/10 text-[#ffd166]",
    low: "border-[#30d158]/35 bg-[#30d158]/10 text-[#30d158]",
    neutral: "border-white/[0.12] bg-white/[0.06] text-[#d4d4d4]",
    cyan: "border-[#4ad7ff]/35 bg-[#4ad7ff]/10 text-[#4ad7ff]",
  }[tone];
}

function sourceLabel(value?: string | null) {
  if (!value) return "Library assets";
  return value
    .split("_")
    .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
    .join(" ");
}

function average(values: number[]) {
  const valid = values.filter(Number.isFinite);
  return valid.length ? valid.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / valid.length : 0;
}

function numberValue(value: unknown) {
  const parsed = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : 0;
}

function toRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  if (typeof value !== "object" || value === null || Array.isArray(value)) {
    return null;
  }

  return value as Record<string, unknown>;
}

function getPath(value: unknown, path: string[]): unknown {
  let current: unknown = value;

  for (const key of path) {
    const record = toRecord(current);
    if (!record) return undefined;
    current = record[key];
  }

  return current;
}

function getFirstString(value: unknown, paths: string[][]): string | null {
  for (const path of paths) {
    const current = getPath(value, path);

    if (typeof current === "string" && current.trim()) return current;
    if (typeof current === "number") return String(current);
    if (typeof current === "boolean") return current ? "Yes" : "No";
  }

  return null;
}

function getFirstNumber(value: unknown, paths: string[][], fallback = 0): number {
  for (const path of paths) {
    const current = getPath(value, path);
    const parsed = Number(current);

    if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
  }

  return fallback;
}

function getFirstBoolean(value: unknown, paths: string[][]): boolean | null {
  for (const path of paths) {
    const current = getPath(value, path);

    if (typeof current === "boolean") return current;

    if (typeof current === "string") {
      const normalized = current.toLowerCase();
      if (["true", "yes", "success", "passed"].includes(normalized)) return true;
      if (["false", "no", "failed", "blocked"].includes(normalized)) return false;
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function getRiskScore(value: unknown) {
  return getFirstNumber(value, [
    ["risk_score"],
    ["average_risk_score"],
    ["score"],
    ["risk_assessment", "risk_score"],
    ["input_evaluation", "risk_score"],
    ["output_evaluation", "risk_score"],
  ]);
}

function getSeverity(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["severity"],
      ["risk_level"],
      ["risk_assessment", "severity"],
      ["input_evaluation", "risk_level"],
      ["output_evaluation", "severity"],
    ]) || severityFromScore(getRiskScore(value))
  );
}

function getAttackSuccess(value: unknown) {
  return getFirstBoolean(value, [
    ["attack_success"],
    ["jailbreak_success"],
    ["success"],
    ["output_evaluation", "attack_success"],
  ]);
}

function getFinalStatus(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["final_status"],
      ["status"],
      ["verdict"],
      ["output_evaluation", "final_status"],
    ]) || "Unknown"
  );
}

function getReasoning(value: unknown) {
  return (
    getFirstString(value, [
      ["reasoning"],
      ["summary"],
      ["analysis"],
      ["output_evaluation", "reasoning"],
      ["risk_assessment", "reasoning"],
    ]) || "No reasoning available."
  );
}

FILE: frontend/src/app/reports/page.tsx
============================================================
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";

  Activity,
  AlertCircle,
  AlertTriangle,
  BarChart3,
  Brain,
  CheckCircle2,
  ChevronRight,
  Copy,
  Database,
  Download,

  FileText,
  Gauge,

} from "lucide-react";

const API_BASE_URL = (
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_HEXAGUARD_API_URL ||
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ||
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ||
  "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1"
).replace(/\/$/, "");

type TabId = "results" | "risk" | "models" | "recommendations";
type RawRecord = Record<string, unknown>;

type RiskLevel = "Critical" | "High" | "Medium" | "Low" | "Safe" | "Not Available";
type Decision = "Blocked" | "Successful Attack" | "Needs Review" | "Error";
type Verdict = "Passed" | "Needs Review" | "Failed" | "Completed with Errors" | "No Results";
type Readiness = "Ready" | "Needs Review" | "Missing";

type CampaignSummary = {
  campaign_id?: string;
  campaignId?: string;
  id?: string;
  name?: string;
  campaign_name?: string;
  status?: string;
  test_source_type?: string;
  dataset_id?: string | null;
  dataset_name?: string | null;
  selected_models?: string[];
  selected_categories?: string[];
  selected_mutations?: string[];
  total_tests?: number;
  completed_tests?: number;
  failed_tests?: number;
  created_at?: string;
  updated_at?: string;
  started_at?: string | null;
  completed_at?: string | null;
};

type CampaignResultsResponse = {
  campaign_id?: string;
  total?: number;
  items?: RawRecord[];
  results?: RawRecord[];
};

type ManualRun = RawRecord;

type NormalizedResult = {
  resultId: string;
  scenarioId: string;
  scenarioName: string;
  inputType: string;
  prompt: string;
  mutatedPrompt: string;
  modelName: string;
  modelProvider: string;
  modelResponse: string;
  aiJudgeStatus: string;
  humanVerdict: string;
  inputRiskScore: number;
  inputRiskLevel: RiskLevel;
  outputRiskScore: number;
  outputRiskLevel: RiskLevel;
  confidence: string;
  owaspMapping: string;
  attackSuccess: boolean;
  decision: Decision;
  reasoning: string;
  executionError: string;
  createdAt: string;
  raw: RawRecord;
};

type ModelSummary = {
  rank: number;
  modelName: string;
  tests: number;
  blocked: number;
  blockRate: number;
  successfulAttacks: number;
  needsReview: number;
  errors: number;
  averageResidualRisk: number;
  highestResidualRisk: number;
  decision: Verdict;
  mostCommonRiskCategory: string;
};

type Recommendation = {
  id: string;
  priority: "Critical" | "High" | "Medium" | "Low" | "Informational";
  riskCategory: string;
  owaspMapping: string;
  affectedModels: string[];
  finding: string;
  recommendedAction: string;
  validationTest: string;
  status: "Open" | "Ready" | "Needs Review";
};

type DistributionRow = {
  label: string;
  count: number;
};

function ReportsContent() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const campaignIdFromUrl =
    searchParams.get("campaignId")?.trim() ||
    searchParams.get("campaign_id")?.trim() ||
    "";

  const savedCampaignId =
    typeof window !== "undefined"
      ? localStorage.getItem("hexaguard_selected_report_campaign_id")?.trim() || ""
      : "";

  const requestedCampaignId = campaignIdFromUrl || savedCampaignId;

  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabId>("results");
  const [campaign, setCampaign] = useState<CampaignSummary | null>(null);
  const [resultPayload, setResultPayload] = useState<CampaignResultsResponse | null>(null);
  const [manualEvidence, setManualEvidence] = useState<ManualRun[]>([]);
  const [selectedResult, setSelectedResult] = useState<NormalizedResult | null>(null);

  const [campaignIdInput, setCampaignIdInput] = useState(requestedCampaignId);
  const [showReportsCatalogModal, setShowReportsCatalogModal] = useState(false);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [modelFilter, setModelFilter] = useState("all");
  const [decisionFilter, setDecisionFilter] = useState("all");
  const [riskFilter, setRiskFilter] = useState("all");
  const [owaspFilter, setOwaspFilter] = useState("all");

  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [notice, setNotice] = useState("");
  const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = useState("");

  const rawResults = useMemo(() => {
    if (Array.isArray(resultPayload?.items)) return resultPayload.items;
    if (Array.isArray(resultPayload?.results)) return resultPayload.results;
    return [];
  }, [resultPayload]);

  const results = useMemo(
    () => rawResults.map((item, index) => normalizeResult(item, index)),
    [rawResults]
  );

  const campaignId =
    getCampaignId(campaign) ||
    resultPayload?.campaign_id ||
    campaignIdFromUrl ||
    campaignIdInput.trim();

  const stats = useMemo(() => buildStats(results, campaign), [results, campaign]);
  const models = useMemo(() => buildModelSummaries(results), [results]);
  const riskData = useMemo(() => buildRiskData(results), [results]);
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => buildRecommendations(results, models), [results, models]);

  const filters = useMemo(
    () => ({
      models: unique(results.map((item) => item.modelName)),
      decisions: unique(results.map((item) => item.decision)),
      risks: unique(results.map((item) => item.outputRiskLevel)),
      owasp: unique(results.map((item) => item.owaspMapping)),
    }),
    [results]
  );

  const filteredResults = useMemo(() => {
    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();

    return results.filter((result) => {
      const searchable = [
        result.resultId,
        result.scenarioId,
        result.scenarioName,
        result.prompt,
        result.mutatedPrompt,
        result.modelName,
        result.inputRiskLevel,
        result.outputRiskLevel,
        result.decision,
        result.owaspMapping,
        result.aiJudgeStatus,
        result.humanVerdict,
        result.executionError,
      ]
        .join(" ")
        .toLowerCase();

      return (
        (!q || searchable.includes(q)) &&
        (modelFilter === "all" || result.modelName === modelFilter) &&
        (decisionFilter === "all" || result.decision === decisionFilter) &&
        (riskFilter === "all" || result.outputRiskLevel === riskFilter) &&
        (owaspFilter === "all" || result.owaspMapping === owaspFilter)
      );
    });
  }, [results, search, modelFilter, decisionFilter, riskFilter, owaspFilter]);

  const readinessChecks = useMemo(
    () =>
      [
        {
          label: "Campaign Completed",
          status: campaign?.status?.toLowerCase() === "completed" ? "Ready" : "Needs Review",
        },
        { label: "Results Available", status: results.length > 0 ? "Ready" : "Missing" },
        { label: "Model Comparison", status: models.length > 0 ? "Ready" : "Missing" },
        { label: "Risk Scores", status: results.length > 0 ? "Ready" : "Missing" },
        { label: "Detailed Findings", status: results.length > 0 ? "Ready" : "Missing" },
        { label: "Recommendations", status: recommendations.length > 0 ? "Ready" : "Needs Review" },
        { label: "Errors Reviewed", status: stats.errors > 0 ? "Needs Review" : "Ready" },
      ] as Array<{ label: string; status: Readiness }>,
    [campaign?.status, results.length, models.length, recommendations.length, stats.errors]
  );

  const exportPayload = useMemo(
    () => ({
      report_type: "HexaGuard Final Analysis Report",
      generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      campaign,
      campaign_id: campaignId || "Not available",
      summary: stats,
      readiness_checks: readinessChecks,
      risk_scores: riskData,
      model_comparison: models,
      recommendations,
      findings: results,
      manual_evidence: manualEvidence,
      limitations:
        manualEvidence.length === 0
          ? "No manual red-team evidence was available from the backend at export time."
          : "Manual red-team evidence included.",
    }),
    [
      campaign,
      campaignId,
      stats,
      readinessChecks,
      riskData,
      models,
      recommendations,
      results,
      manualEvidence,
    ]
  );

  const loadReport = useCallback(
    async (targetCampaignId?: string) => {
      setLoading(true);
      setNotice("");
      setErrorMessage("");

      const exactId = (targetCampaignId || requestedCampaignId || "").trim();

      try {
        const manual = await loadManualEvidenceSafely();
        setManualEvidence(manual);

        if (exactId) {
          const bundle = await loadCampaignBundle(exactId);

          if (!bundle) {
            setCampaign(null);
            setResultPayload(null);
            setCampaignIdInput(exactId);
            setErrorMessage(`Unable to load campaign results for ${exactId}.`);
            return;
          }

          setCampaign(bundle.campaign);
          setResultPayload(bundle.results);
          setCampaignIdInput(exactId);

          if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
            window.localStorage.setItem("hexaguard_selected_report_campaign_id", exactId);
          }

          setNotice(`Loaded report for ${exactId}.`);
          return;
        }

        const latestCampaign = await loadLatestCompletedCampaign();

        if (!latestCampaign) {
          setCampaign(null);
          setResultPayload(null);
          setCampaignIdInput("");
          setNotice("No completed campaign selected. Open Campaigns and send a completed campaign to Reports.");
          return;
        }

        const latestId = getCampaignId(latestCampaign);

        if (!latestId) {
          setCampaign(null);
          setResultPayload(null);
          setErrorMessage("Latest campaign was found, but its campaign ID was missing.");
          return;
        }

        const bundle = await loadCampaignBundle(latestId);

        if (!bundle) {
          setCampaign(null);
          setResultPayload(null);
          setErrorMessage("Unable to load the latest completed campaign results.");
          return;
        }

        setCampaign(bundle.campaign);
        setResultPayload(bundle.results);
        setCampaignIdInput(latestId);

        if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
          window.localStorage.setItem("hexaguard_selected_report_campaign_id", latestId);
        }

        setNotice(`Loaded latest completed campaign: ${latestId}.`);
      } catch (error) {
        setCampaign(null);
        setResultPayload(null);
        setErrorMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unable to load campaign results.");
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [requestedCampaignId]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    loadReport();
  }, [loadReport]);

  function clearFilters() {
    setSearch("");
    setModelFilter("all");
    setDecisionFilter("all");
    setRiskFilter("all");
    setOwaspFilter("all");
  }

  function buildProfessionalReportPayload() {
  const generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();

  const unsafeOutputs = results.filter(
    (result) =>
      result.decision === "Successful Attack" ||
      result.outputRiskLevel === "Critical" ||
      result.outputRiskLevel === "High"
  ).length;

  const riskyInputs = results.filter((result) =>
    ["Critical", "High", "Medium"].includes(result.inputRiskLevel)
  ).length;

  const safelyHandled = results.filter(
    (result) => result.decision === "Blocked" && result.outputRiskLevel === "Safe"
  ).length;

  const riskMovements = buildRiskTransitions(results);

  const modelInsight =
    typeof analyzeModelComparison === "function"
      ? analyzeModelComparison(models)
      : {
          safestLabel: stats.safestModel,
          safestHelper: "Best safety ranking",
          vulnerableLabel: stats.mostVulnerableModel,
          vulnerableHelper: "Highest residual risk",
          bestBlockLabel: `${stats.bestBlockRate}%`,
          bestBlockHelper: "Highest blocked attack rate",
        };

  const overallResidualRisk =
    stats.successfulAttacks > 0 || unsafeOutputs > 0
      ? "High"
      : stats.needsReview > 0 || stats.averageResidualRisk >= 35
        ? "Medium"
        : "Low";

  const executiveConclusion =
    stats.successfulAttacks > 0 || unsafeOutputs > 0
      ? "The campaign detected unsafe model behavior. Mitigation and re-testing are required before deployment."
      : stats.needsReview > 0 || stats.errors > 0
        ? "The campaign did not confirm successful attacks, but some results require analyst review before final approval."
        : "The campaign tested risky prompts and the evaluated models handled them safely. No unsafe outputs or successful attacks were detected.";

  return {
    report_metadata: {
      report_title: "HexaGuard AI Risk Analysis Analytical Report",
      report_type: "Final Campaign Risk Analysis",
      generated_at: generatedAt,
      generated_by: "HexaGuard Reports",
      campaign_id: campaignId || "Not available",
      campaign_name: campaign?.name || campaign?.campaign_name || "Selected campaign",
      campaign_status: campaign?.status || "Loaded",
      input_source: String(((campaign as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)?.input_source || (campaign as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)?.inputSource || "Not available")),
    },

    executive_summary: {
      final_verdict: stats.verdict,
      overall_residual_risk: overallResidualRisk,
      analyst_conclusion: executiveConclusion,
      total_tests: stats.totalTests,
      completed_tests: stats.completedTests,
      models_tested: stats.modelsTested,
      blocked_attacks: stats.blocked,
      successful_attacks: stats.successfulAttacks,
      needs_review: stats.needsReview,
      execution_errors: stats.errors,
      average_residual_risk: `${stats.averageResidualRisk}/100`,
    },

    risk_analysis: {
      interpretation:
        "Input risk represents how dangerous the tested prompt was before model response. Residual output risk represents the remaining risk after the model generated its response.",
      risky_inputs: riskyInputs,
      safely_handled: safelyHandled,
      unsafe_outputs: unsafeOutputs,
      needs_review: stats.needsReview,
      risk_movements: riskMovements,
      input_risk_distribution: riskData.inputRiskDistribution,
      residual_output_risk_distribution: riskData.outputRiskDistribution,
      final_decision_distribution: riskData.outcomeDistribution,
      owasp_category_distribution: riskData.owaspDistribution,
    },

    model_analysis: {
      safest_model: modelInsight.safestLabel,
      safest_model_summary: modelInsight.safestHelper,
      most_vulnerable_model: modelInsight.vulnerableLabel,
      most_vulnerable_summary: modelInsight.vulnerableHelper,
      best_block_rate: modelInsight.bestBlockLabel,
      best_block_rate_summary: modelInsight.bestBlockHelper,
      ranked_models: models.map((model) => ({
        rank: model.rank,
        model_name: model.modelName,
        tests: model.tests,
        blocked: model.blocked,
        block_rate: `${model.blockRate}%`,
        successful_attacks: model.successfulAttacks,
        needs_review: model.needsReview,
        errors: model.errors,
        average_residual_risk: `${model.averageResidualRisk}/100`,
        highest_residual_risk: `${model.highestResidualRisk}/100`,
        decision: model.decision,
        primary_risk_category: model.mostCommonRiskCategory,
      })),
    },

    detailed_findings: results.map((result) => ({
      result_id: result.resultId,
      scenario: result.scenarioName,
      model: result.modelName,
      input_type: result.inputType,
      input_risk: `${result.inputRiskLevel} / ${result.inputRiskScore}`,
      output_risk: `${result.outputRiskLevel} / ${result.outputRiskScore}`,
      risk_movement: `${result.inputRiskLevel} → ${result.outputRiskLevel}`,
      decision: result.decision,
      attack_success: result.attackSuccess,
      owasp_mapping: result.owaspMapping,
      ai_judge_status: result.aiJudgeStatus,
      confidence: result.confidence,
      prompt: result.prompt,
      mutated_prompt: result.mutatedPrompt,
      model_response: result.modelResponse,
      judge_reasoning: result.reasoning,
      execution_error: result.executionError || null,
      created_at: result.createdAt,
    })),

    recommendations: recommendations.map((recommendation) => ({
      id: recommendation.id,
      priority: recommendation.priority,
      risk_category: recommendation.riskCategory,
      owasp_mapping: recommendation.owaspMapping,
      affected_models: recommendation.affectedModels,
      finding: recommendation.finding,
      recommended_action: recommendation.recommendedAction,
      validation_test: recommendation.validationTest,
      status: recommendation.status,
    })),

    report_readiness: readinessChecks,
    manual_red_team_evidence: manualEvidence,
  };
}

function buildProfessionalMarkdownReport() {
  const report = buildProfessionalReportPayload();

  const lines = [
    "# HexaGuard AI Risk Analysis Analytical Report",
    "",
    `Generated At: ${report.report_metadata.generated_at}`,
    `Campaign ID: ${report.report_metadata.campaign_id}`,
    `Campaign Name: ${report.report_metadata.campaign_name}`,
    `Campaign Status: ${report.report_metadata.campaign_status}`,
    "",
    "## Executive Summary",
    "",
    `Final Verdict: ${report.executive_summary.final_verdict}`,
    `Overall Residual Risk: ${report.executive_summary.overall_residual_risk}`,
    `Analyst Conclusion: ${report.executive_summary.analyst_conclusion}`,
    "",
    `Total Tests: ${report.executive_summary.total_tests}`,
    `Models Tested: ${report.executive_summary.models_tested}`,
    `Blocked Attacks: ${report.executive_summary.blocked_attacks}`,
    `Successful Attacks: ${report.executive_summary.successful_attacks}`,
    `Needs Review: ${report.executive_summary.needs_review}`,
    `Execution Errors: ${report.executive_summary.execution_errors}`,
    `Average Residual Risk: ${report.executive_summary.average_residual_risk}`,
    "",
    "## Risk Analysis",
    "",
    report.risk_analysis.interpretation,
    "",
    `Risky Inputs: ${report.risk_analysis.risky_inputs}`,
    `Safely Handled: ${report.risk_analysis.safely_handled}`,
    `Unsafe Outputs: ${report.risk_analysis.unsafe_outputs}`,
    `Needs Review: ${report.risk_analysis.needs_review}`,
    "",
    "### Risk Movements",
    "",
    ...report.risk_analysis.risk_movements.map(
      (movement) => `- ${movement.label}: ${movement.count} finding(s)`
    ),
    "",
    "## Model Analysis",
    "",
    `Safest Model: ${report.model_analysis.safest_model}`,
    `Safest Model Summary: ${report.model_analysis.safest_model_summary}`,
    `Most Vulnerable Model: ${report.model_analysis.most_vulnerable_model}`,
    `Most Vulnerable Summary: ${report.model_analysis.most_vulnerable_summary}`,
    `Best Block Rate: ${report.model_analysis.best_block_rate}`,
    "",
    "### Ranked Models",
    "",
    ...report.model_analysis.ranked_models.map(
      (model) =>
        `- #${model.rank} ${model.model_name}: ${model.block_rate} block rate, ${model.successful_attacks} successful attacks, ${model.average_residual_risk} average residual risk, decision: ${model.decision}`
    ),
    "",
    "## Detailed Findings",
    "",
    ...report.detailed_findings.map(
      (finding) =>
        `- ${finding.scenario} | ${finding.model} | ${finding.risk_movement} | ${finding.decision} | Output Risk: ${finding.output_risk} | OWASP: ${finding.owasp_mapping}`
    ),
    "",
    "## Recommendations",
    "",
    ...(
      report.recommendations.length
        ? report.recommendations.map(
            (recommendation) =>
              `- [${recommendation.priority}] ${recommendation.risk_category}: ${recommendation.recommended_action}`
          )
        : ["- No urgent mitigation was generated. Maintain current controls, expand test coverage, and re-test with stricter adversarial scenarios."]
    ),
    "",
    "## Report Readiness",
    "",
    ...report.report_readiness.map(
      (item) => `- ${item.label}: ${item.status}`
    ),
    "",
  ];

  return lines.join("\\n");
}

function escapeReportHtml(value: unknown) {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
    .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
    .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}

function buildProfessionalHtmlReport() {
  const report = buildProfessionalReportPayload();

  const findingRows = report.detailed_findings
    .map(
      (finding) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.scenario)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.model)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.risk_movement)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.decision)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.output_risk)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.owasp_mapping)}</td>
        </tr>
      `
    )
    .join("");

  const modelRows = report.model_analysis.ranked_models
    .map(
      (model) => `
        <tr>
          <td>#${escapeReportHtml(model.rank)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.model_name)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.tests)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.block_rate)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.successful_attacks)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.average_residual_risk)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.decision)}</td>
        </tr>
      `
    )
    .join("");

  const movementItems = report.risk_analysis.risk_movements
    .map(
      (movement) => `
        <div class="movement">
          <strong>${escapeReportHtml(movement.label)}</strong>
          <span>${escapeReportHtml(movement.count)} finding(s)</span>
        </div>
      `
    )
    .join("");

  const recommendationItems = report.recommendations.length
    ? report.recommendations
        .map(
          (recommendation) => `
            <li>
              <strong>[${escapeReportHtml(recommendation.priority)}] ${escapeReportHtml(recommendation.risk_category)}:</strong>
              ${escapeReportHtml(recommendation.recommended_action)}
            </li>
          `
        )
        .join("")
    : "<li>No urgent mitigation was generated. Maintain current controls, expand test coverage, and re-test with stricter adversarial scenarios.</li>";

  return `
<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>HexaGuard Analytical Report</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: #0b0f12;
      --panel: #11171c;
      --panel2: #161d22;
      --line: #26323a;
      --text: #f3f7f8;
      --muted: #9aa6ad;
      --cyan: #35d7ff;
      --green: #62e6a8;
      --red: #ff4545;
      --amber: #ffd05a;
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif;
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    .page {
      max-width: 1120px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 42px;
    }

    .hero {
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(53,215,255,0.12), rgba(255,69,69,0.08)), var(--panel);
      border-radius: 28px;
      padding: 34px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .eyebrow {
      color: var(--cyan);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    h1, h2, h3 {
      margin: 0;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }

    h1 {
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 34px;
    }

    h2 {
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      font-size: 22px;
    }

    .muted {
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .grid {
      display: grid;
      gap: 14px;
    }

    .grid-4 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    }

    .metric {
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      background: var(--panel2);
      border-radius: 18px;
      padding: 18px;
    }

    .metric-label {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .metric-value {
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 24px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .panel {
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      background: var(--panel);
      border-radius: 24px;
      padding: 26px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .movement {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      background: var(--panel2);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 14px 16px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 16px;
    }

    th, td {
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      padding: 12px;
      text-align: left;
      vertical-align: top;
      font-size: 13px;
    }

    th {
      color: var(--muted);
      background: #0d1216;
      font-size: 10px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    }

    .green { color: var(--green); }
    .red { color: var(--red); }
    .amber { color: var(--amber); }
    .cyan { color: var(--cyan); }

    @media print {
      body { background: white; color: #111; }
      .hero, .panel, .metric, .movement { break-inside: avoid; }
      .page { padding: 22px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <main class="page">
    <section class="hero">
      <div class="eyebrow">HexaGuard AI Security</div>
      <h1>AI Risk Analysis Analytical Report</h1>
      <p class="muted">
        Generated at ${escapeReportHtml(report.report_metadata.generated_at)} ·
        Campaign ${escapeReportHtml(report.report_metadata.campaign_id)}
      </p>
      <h2 class="cyan">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.final_verdict)}</h2>
      <p>${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.analyst_conclusion)}</p>
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <h2>Executive Summary</h2>
      <div class="grid grid-4">
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Total Tests</div><div class="metric-value">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.total_tests)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Models Tested</div><div class="metric-value">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.models_tested)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Blocked</div><div class="metric-value green">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.blocked_attacks)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Successful Attacks</div><div class="metric-value red">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.successful_attacks)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Needs Review</div><div class="metric-value amber">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.needs_review)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Errors</div><div class="metric-value">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.execution_errors)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Average Risk</div><div class="metric-value">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.average_residual_risk)}</div></div>
        <div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Residual Risk</div><div class="metric-value green">${escapeReportHtml(report.executive_summary.overall_residual_risk)}</div></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <h2>Risk Movement Analysis</h2>
      <p class="muted">${escapeReportHtml(report.risk_analysis.interpretation)}</p>
      ${movementItems}
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <h2>Model Comparison</h2>
      <p><strong>Safest Model:</strong> ${escapeReportHtml(report.model_analysis.safest_model)}</p>
      <p><strong>Most Vulnerable Model:</strong> ${escapeReportHtml(report.model_analysis.most_vulnerable_model)}</p>
      <table>
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Rank</th>
            <th>Model</th>
            <th>Tests</th>
            <th>Block Rate</th>
            <th>Attacks</th>
            <th>Avg Risk</th>
            <th>Decision</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>${modelRows}</tbody>
      </table>
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <h2>Detailed Findings</h2>
      <table>
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Scenario</th>
            <th>Model</th>
            <th>Risk Movement</th>
            <th>Decision</th>
            <th>Output Risk</th>
            <th>OWASP</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>${findingRows}</tbody>
      </table>
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <h2>Recommendations</h2>
      <ul>${recommendationItems}</ul>
    </section>
  </main>

  <script>
    window.onload = () => setTimeout(() => window.print(), 400);
  </script>
</body>
</html>`;
}

async function syncProfessionalReport() {
  await loadReport();
  setNotice("Report synchronized with the latest backend campaign evidence.");
}

async function copyProfessionalReport() {
  const markdown = buildProfessionalMarkdownReport();

  await navigator.clipboard.writeText(markdown);
  setNotice("Professional analytical report copied to clipboard.");
}

function exportJson() {
  const professionalReport = buildProfessionalReportPayload();

  downloadTextFile(
    `hexaguard-analytical-report-${campaignId || "latest"}.json`,
    JSON.stringify(professionalReport, null, 2),
    "application/json"
  );

  setNotice("Professional JSON analytical report exported.");
}

function exportEvidenceCsv() {
  const escapeCsv = (value: unknown) => {
    const text = value === null || value === undefined ? "" : String(value);
    return `"${text.replaceAll('"', '""')}"`;
  };

  const headers = [
    "campaignId",
    "resultId",
    "scenarioId",
    "scenarioName",
    "modelName",
    "modelProvider",
    "inputRiskLevel",
    "inputRiskScore",
    "outputRiskLevel",
    "outputRiskScore",
    "decision",
    "attackSuccess",
    "owaspMapping",
    "confidence",
    "aiJudgeStatus",
    "prompt",
    "mutatedPrompt",
    "modelResponse",
    "reasoning",
    "executionError",
    "createdAt",
  ];

  const rows = results.map((result) => ({
    campaignId: campaignId || "latest",
    resultId: result.resultId,
    scenarioId: result.scenarioId,
    scenarioName: result.scenarioName,
    modelName: result.modelName,
    modelProvider: result.modelProvider,
    inputRiskLevel: result.inputRiskLevel,
    inputRiskScore: result.inputRiskScore,
    outputRiskLevel: result.outputRiskLevel,
    outputRiskScore: result.outputRiskScore,
    decision: result.decision,
    attackSuccess: result.attackSuccess,
    owaspMapping: result.owaspMapping,
    confidence: result.confidence,
    aiJudgeStatus: result.aiJudgeStatus,
    prompt: result.prompt,
    mutatedPrompt: result.mutatedPrompt,
    modelResponse: result.modelResponse,
    reasoning: result.reasoning,
    executionError: result.executionError || "",
    createdAt: result.createdAt,
  }));

  const csv = [
    headers.join(","),
    ...rows.map((row) =>
      headers.map((header) => escapeCsv(row[header as keyof typeof row])).join(",")
    ),
  ].join("\n");

  downloadTextFile(
    `hexaguard-evidence-findings-${campaignId || "latest"}.csv`,
    csv,
    "text/csv;charset=utf-8"
  );

  setNotice("Evidence findings CSV exported.");
}




  function exportCsv() {
  const report = buildProfessionalReportPayload();

  const modelRows = report.model_analysis.ranked_models
    .map(
      (model) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.rank)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.model_name)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.tests)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.blocked)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.block_rate)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.successful_attacks)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.needs_review)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.errors)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.average_residual_risk)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.decision)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(model.primary_risk_category)}</td>
        </tr>
      `
    )
    .join("");

  const findingRows = report.detailed_findings
    .map(
      (finding) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.result_id)}</td>
          <td>${escapeReportHtml(finding.scenario)}</td>
